subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God, Lord of all beings and Educator of all contingent things! I beseech Thee by Thy Cause which hath encompassed all existence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا اله الکائنات و مربی الممکنات اسئلک بامرک الذی احاط الموجودات
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @prayer for women
